creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Kai,

The last patch still rejects:

Patching file anki/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 1.
Hunk #2 failed at 23.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 33.
2 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to anki/Makefile.rej
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...

You probably didn't update the ports tree.

Additionally, when I applied this manually, patch under files/ fails.

Yuri
